title: Mythic Compat
description: A small library mod to add recipe compatibilities for Mythic Upgrades.
body:
## ☕ About Mythic Compat
---
- **Mythic Compat** (Mythic Lib) adds cross upgrade recipes for Mythic Upgrades!

- Thanks to Mythic Compat, you can upgrade your Topaz Chestplate to Ametrine Chestplate, same goes for every helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots, axe, sword or whatever!
